deliverables: Details/context for involvement and tiers (from Vrijen)

ctas.text: Send self‑determination theory paper to the group
ctas.verbatim: I was literally just thinking I wanted to send it to you because I haven't published it yet but I was like my professor like yeah, anyway, go.

ctas.text: Read Logan’s self‑determination theory paper once shared
ctas.verbatim: Okay if it's public I would love to read that.

ctas.text: Share the paper and invite feedback
ctas.verbatim: I'll send it to you. I would be curious to hear your thoughts too, because it was essential.

ctas.text: Send a quick follow‑up and propose next steps
ctas.verbatim: I'll send a quick follow up. Would love to geek out a little bit.

ctas.text: Send details/context and optionality for involvement (tiers)
ctas.verbatim: Absolutely. No, this sounds good. Let me send you details. Context optionality for involvement, varying tiers. And then you just let us know we'll communicate directly.
I hope to talk to you about it next time. Yeah, we'll do amazing. Catch you later.

decisions.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
decisions.decision: Initial ICP focus on Product Managers; buyer side likely Seed to Series A–C companies
decisions.verbatim: ...keen on making Careerspan the next big thing ... we’ve honed in on the product manager product as sort of an ICP ... buyer side ... most likely Seed ... Series A through C companies ...

resonance_details.speaker: Logan Currie
resonance_details.text: It was. It was an adventure, I tell you that much ... resilience, adaptability, and I'm like, I am so prepared ... I will find friends and I will make something happen.

resonance_details.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
resonance_details.text: ... the message of the movie is opportunity exists at the frontier ... reflected in the reality of startups ...

resonance_details.speaker: Logan Currie
resonance_details.text: ... adaptability, learning how to learn, and your ability to connect with other people ... it's not higher education, I tell you that much.

speaker_quotes: Just we've trained to be cockroaches. We will survive.
Trained to be cockroaches? Yeah. We'll survive anywhere.
So it's just a bet that you make and you have to make bets at the frontier.
I'll send a quick follow up. Would love to geek out a little bit.

processing.logging: disabled on stdout during JSON emission

lessons_learned: Use LLM-only extraction with strict time anchoring; avoid regex/keyword heuristics.
Do not write logs to stdout when emitting JSON artifacts; keep outputs clean.
Establish a single canonical transcript source and verify it end-to-end before processing.
Attach verbatim quotes and timestamps for every actionable/decisional item to aid review.
Provide a TOC and indices so downstream workflows can reference JSON Pointers precisely.
summary: Conversation on career development, international experience as resilience training, soft-skills “base athleticism,” effective AI usage, and practical next steps to engage with Careerspan (ICP focus on PMs; buyers Seed–Series A–C).

rules: High: direct first-person commitment with timestamp + verbatim
Medium: implied commitment or acceptance language with timestamp
Low: inferred from context; requires confirmation before externalizing

ask_user_when: Missing due date/scope for actionable in external mode

due_date_policy.notes: Compute both from meeting_datetime; suggest the later; override as needed.
